creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
On Sat, 18 Jun 2011 01:00:38 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/drood,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/157967 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157967
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Please make sure the checksums are correct, for a new distfile was
released today.  If so, then commit.

thanks,

-- 
James Bailie
http://www.mammothcheese.ca
